name: Lasagne Rollups
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the noodles until they are easy to work with and very al dente. Drain on a flat cloth to remove excess moisture.
2. Filling: Combine 1 lb ricotta, 4 oz grated mozzarella, ½ cup grated Italian cheese, ½ pkg frozen chopped spinach (cooked and drained well), 1 egg, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Sauce: Use any meat sauce, marinara sauce, or jarred sauce if preferred. A homemade marinara sauce recipe is available, as well as a meat sauce to be posted later in the day.
4. Assembly: Mix the filling ingredients together well. Place each wide noodle on a baking sheet and spread the filling along the entire strip, leaving 1 inch at each end. Gently roll up each noodle while keeping the filling inside.
5. In a rectangular dish, cover the bottom with sauce. Arrange the roll-ups side by side and pour enough sauce over top to partially cover. Seal with foil.
6. Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes. For a special topping, use a white sauce or what is called "bächemal."
7. Low-Fat Conversion:
- Ricotta: No fat
- Mozzarella: No fat
- Grated cheese: Alpine Lite grated Parmesan
- Egg: Egg beaters or 2 egg whites
- Sauce: Homemade without oil, butter, or meat; Healthy choice
This recipe can be frozen in individual portions before or after cooking. It's perfect for when you don't have time to fuss over a meal.
